name: Western Union
description_short: Seal Beach, CA's Western Union at 1101 Pacific Coast Hwy offers money transfers, bill payment, and check cashing services daily from 8AM-8PM.
description_long:
Western Union in Seal Beach, CA is located at 1101 Pacific Coast Hwy, a prominent commercial stretch in Orange County. This standalone branch operates daily from 8AM to 8PM, offering convenient access for both residents and visitors seeking financial services. The location's extended hours make it accessible for weekday errands and weekend banking needs.

This Seal Beach location provides a comprehensive range of Western Union services, including domestic and international money transfers, bill payment options, and check cashing. Customers can contact the branch at +1 562-370-1937 to confirm transaction limits, current exchange rates, or ask about accepted payment methods.

For Seal Beach residents needing reliable money transfer and check cashing services, this Western Union branch on Pacific Coast Hwy is conveniently positioned for easy access. Bring a valid government-issued ID for any transaction, and be prepared for applicable fees and exchange rates depending on your service. Western Union provides trusted financial services to communities nationwide.
address: 1101 Pacific Coast Hwy, Seal Beach, CA 90740

company_info.headquarters: 1101 Pacific Coast Hwy, Seal Beach, CA 90740

pros: Extensive U.S. agent network with 150+ locations across multiple major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger)
24/7 online transfer initiation with flexible in-store payment options based on agent hours
Multi-language platform support including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Multiple service offerings including wire transfers, money orders, bill payments, mobile top-ups, and prepaid cards
Global network spanning 200+ countries for international money transfers
Established brand with over 150 years of operational history and corporate transparency
Western Union Rewards loyalty program and referral incentive options
cons: No information provided on fee structures, exchange rates, or cost comparisons with competitors on the reviewed pages
Orange Wallet payment method shown as temporarily unavailable, indicating service reliability issues
Limited technical details about transfer speed, delivery timeframes, or processing times disclosed
Dependent on agent location hours for in-person service, limiting true 24/7 accessibility despite online availability
No clear information on fraud protection guarantees or consumer dispute resolution processes
best_for: Consumers needing physical cash pickup from retail locations rather than direct bank deposit
International remittance senders with recipients in 200+ countries
Unbanked or underbanked consumers preferring cash transactions over digital payments
Multilingual users requiring non-English language platform access
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers who need physical cash pickup, international remittances, or bill payments through established retail locations and prefer traditional financial access over digital-only platforms. The main caveat is that detailed pricing, transfer speed, and fee information are not disclosed on the location-finder pages reviewed, requiring direct contact with agents or the website's main services section for cost comparison against digital alternatives.
services: Online money transfer initiation (24/7 web access)
In-store payment and cash pickup at agent locations
Domestic money transfers within the United States
meta_description: Western Union at 1101 Pacific Coast Hwy, Seal Beach, CA. Fast money transfers and check cashing, open 8AM-8PM daily.
